data.title: LDO price spikes to $1.10 with 1.66% gains driven by whale activity and $1M investment, ignoring profit-taking.
data.description: The digital asset LDO is currently trading at $1.10, reflecting a daily increase of 1.66%. This price surge can be attributed to significant accumulation by a whale investor and a substantial $1 million investment by Arthur Hayes. Despite some profit-taking in the recent past, the market is experiencing a strong bullish momentum.

data.title: Global CRISPR Gene Editing Market expected to reach USD 12.6 billion by 2034 with a 13.01% CAGR; valued at USD 3.65 billion in 2024 and USD 4.10 billion in 2025. Key players include CRISPR Therapeutics AG, Agilent Technologies Inc., Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., and GeneCopoeia Inc. Key trends: rise in demand for personalized medicine, growth in agricultural biotechnology, and integration of synthetic biology. Report coverage includes market size projections, CAGR, key segments, and regional scope in North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America. Market size in 2024 was USD 3.65 billion, with a 13.01% CAGR from 2025-2034.
data.description: The article discusses the CRISPR Gene Editing Market, stating that the global market was valued at USD 3.65 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 4.10 billion in 2025, with a projected value of around USD 12.6 billion by 2034, at a CAGR of about 13.01% during the period 2025-2034. Major players in the field include CRISPR Therapeutics AG, Agilent Technologies Inc., Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., and GeneCopoeia Inc. Key trends include a rise in demand for personalized medicine, growth in agricultural biotechnology, and the integration of synthetic biology. These trends are driving innovation and investment in CRISPR technology. Advanced AI and automation are enhancing precision in gene editing, leading to collaborations between various sectors. The report covers market size, growth rates, key segments, and regional scope, providing insights into the industry's competitive landscape and future trends.

data.title: Old Spice and DC team up at Comic-Con to promote new scent line with interactive experience, emphasizing freshness.
data.description: Old Spice is teaming up with Superman™ to bring an exciting experience to San Diego Comic-Con (7/24 - 7/27). The collaboration is inspired by Old Spice's latest "Smell Super" ad featuring the NEW Old Spice x Superman Collection. At the event, attendees can enjoy an interactive experience showcasing a regular teenager transforming into a stronger, manlier version of himself. The Old Spice x Superman Collection will offer a blast of 24/7 freshness to fans in attendance.

data.title: Dow Jones falls with surprise jobless claim drop. Netflix triggers sell rule, Tesla slammed in Nasdaq upswing.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following an unexpected decrease in weekly jobless claims. Additionally, Netflix triggered a significant IBD sell rule. The Nasdaq demonstrated an increase, with three new energy companies standing out. This was discussed in the latest coverage of the stock market today, where Tesla faced challenges as well.

data.title: DOGE news: Bit Origin's treasury buys may drive rally to $0.29, improving sentiment and lifting altcoin above resistance.
data.description: Bit Origin's recent purchase of Dogecoin for its cryptocurrency treasury could potentially enhance market sentiment and propel the altcoin above the resistance level of $0.29. This move by Bit Origin is significant as it demonstrates confidence in Dogecoin's potential for growth and stability in the crypto market. The news has already started to positively impact the value of Dogecoin, with its price showing signs of strengthening following the announcement. By actively investing in Dogecoin, Bit Origin is not only diversifying its cryptocurrency holdings but also contributing to the overall bullish outlook for the altcoin. The purchase is expected to further encourage traders and investors to consider Dogecoin as a valuable asset, potentially leading to increased demand and higher trading volume in the near future.

data.title: Ex-UFC fighter Ben Askren promotes crypto scam after nearly dying; Sahil Arora's meme coin causes losses for investors.
data.description: Sahil Arora, known for creating celebrity meme coins, has taken credit for the promotion of a Solana-based meme coin by Askren, which resulted in losses for investors.

data.title: Despite July's 100% surge, HBAR's price drops to $0.25 with bullish indicators post 3.9% pullback from resistance levels.
data.description: Following a surge of over 100% in July, HBAR is currently trading at $0.25. Despite a recent 3.9% pullback from resistance levels, technical indicators suggest bullish momentum for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: McPherson College in Kansas unveils 1972 Ferrari 365 GTB/4 Daytona hanging from ceiling in new student center, boasting 55,000 sq ft building.
data.description: In McPherson, Kansas, McPherson College unveiled its Campus Commons student center through a ribbon-cutting ceremony. The striking centerpiece of the 55,000-square-foot building is a rare 1972 Ferrari 365 GTB/4 Daytona, lifted to the atrium ceiling. The new center in McPherson, KS offers dining choices, a coffee shop, campus store, and areas for student collaboration and lounging.

data.title: MedComms Experts acquires NexGen Healthcare Communications to enhance strategic communications platform for global expansion.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, MedComms Experts ("MCE"), a worldwide medical communications agency supported by The Brydon Group, revealed its acquisition of NexGen Healthcare Communications ("NexGen"). NexGen, a UK-based agency known for integrated solutions, will now join MCE's network. This move signifies a significant development in the industry, consolidating two leading agencies.

data.title: Sarepta stock plunges as FDA demands more testing for gene therapy Elevidys, raising concerns about dangerous precedent.
data.description: Sarepta's shares experienced a significant decrease on Thursday due to news that the FDA will mandate further clinical trials to confirm the safety of Elevidys. This setback could have alarming implications for gene therapies, as the company faces challenges in gaining regulatory approval. The stock market responded to this development, underscoring the importance of thorough testing in ensuring the safety and efficacy of new treatments.
